news.t: Amplify ETFs Launches the Amplify Stablecoin Technology ETF (STBQ) and the Amplify Tokenization Technology ETF (TKNQ)

overview.description: The Amplify Tokenization Technology Leaders ETF (TKNQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. Constituents are selected by market-cap and assets under management (AUM). TKNQ was launched on Dec 22, 2025 and is issued by Amplify Investments.

data.title: Amplify ETFs Launches the Amplify Stablecoin Technology ETF (STBQ) and the Amplify Tokenization Technology ETF (TKNQ)
data.text: CHICAGO, Dec. 23, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Amplify ETFs , an award winning crypto ETF provider, and leading provider of breakthrough ETF solutions, announces the launch of the first-of-their-kind Ampl...
